Scenario Description: Login with valid username (student) and valid password (Password123).
Expected Result: Success message "Logged In Successfully" is displayed.

Scenario Description: Verify URL changes to the correct landing page after successful login.
Verify that the "Log out" button appears and functions on the success page.
Expected Result: User is redirected back to the login page after clicking logout.

Scenario Description: Verify input field behavior (placeholders are correct and fields can be focused).
Expected Result: Fields accept inputs cleanly and display accurate placeholders.

Scenario Description: Verify UI responsiveness and elements alignment on standard resolutions.
Expected Result: Form is vertically aligned, legible, and elements do not overlap.

Scenario Description: Login with an invalid username and valid password.
Expected Result: Error message "Your username is invalid!" appears.

Scenario Description: Login with a valid username and invalid password.
Expected Result: Error message "Your password is invalid!" appears.

Scenario Description: Submit the login form with completely blank input fields.
Expected Result: Error message indicating required fields or invalid username appears.

Scenario Description: Attempt SQL injection payload or special characters in the text fields.
Expected Result: Application securely rejects input or displays generic invalid validation.

Scenario Description: Attempt to bypass login by manually navigating to the success URL directly.
Expected Result: Application redirects unauthorized session back to the login page.
